case_title: JUDY QING HU VS. CHAO MING CHANG

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (IFP: $0.00) SERVED APR-10-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, CHAO MING

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-28-2019 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO JUN-11-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JUDY QING IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPERTER REBECCA CHAU. DEFENDANT CHAO MING CHANG IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPERTER REBECCA CHAU. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. COURT FINDS DEFENDANT GAVE PLAINTIFF A CHECK IN THE CORRECT AMOUNT AS A RETURN OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT.
